programmes.show_description: From street food to smart tech, traditions to trending lifestyles, Singapore Hour is your ultimate insider's guide to travel, work, and play in the Lion City.

Big Tobacco provides jobs for millions of Indonesians but they come at a cost for hundreds of children working in tobacco fields Childworkers suffer from the effects of nicotine poisoning and pesticid
Malaysians Edwin and Dr Achier face off with fish bombers and intruders in the high seas to protect the fragile marine ecosystem of the Sugud Islands in Malaysia.
From street food to smart tech, traditions to trending lifestyles, Singapore Hour is your ultimate insider's guide to travel, work, and play in the Lion City.
